pi_items.source: Explicitly defined as GROUP_ID='linux-webservers' in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh
Matches the explicit XML element checks in verifier.py which requires 3 distinct localfile blocks, and the presence of syscheck, wodle, and rootcheck elements.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically configured parameters within a local Wazuh container. The target group ID 'linux-webservers' and the expected agent configuration path '/var/ossec/etc/shared/linux-webservers/agent.conf' are explicitly required by the setup and export scripts. The expected agent.conf XML structure must contain exactly 3 localfile blocks, and one each of syscheck, wodle, and rootcheck blocks, matching the logic in the verifier script.
